### DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE ###
### APPLY CUSTOM PARAMETERS TO userconfig.txt ###
[cm4]
dtoverlay=dwc2,dr_mode=host
otg_mode=1
[pi5]
dtoverlay=vc4-kms-v3d-pi5
# dtparam=uart0_console # Disabled by default
dtparam=nvme
dtparam=pciex1_gen=2
[all]
arm_64bit=0
dtparam=audio=on
audio_pwm_mode=2
dtparam=i2c_arm=on
disable_splash=1
hdmi_force_hotplug=1
force_eeprom_read=0
